title: data-tw memo-fetch pack
description:
Output of `pack.py --ticker <ticker> --pack memo-fetch`. Heavy single-ticker pull for the equity-memo path. Superset of snapshot — adds MOPS cash_flow + monthly_revenue + dividends 5y + director_holdings + insider_trades + announcements; TWSE three_investor + (sii only) stock_day_history; FinMind margin_history (90d, 2-gap) and price_history (.TWO only, Tier 2). _pack='memo-fetch'. _partial flips on any Tier A error across the full set.

ROC year notes: balance_sheet / income_statement / cash_flow use latest_roc_quarter() — for example fetched on 2026-05-01 the Q4 2025 (ROC year=114, season=4) is used because post-Apr 1 the Q4 filing deadline (Mar 31) has passed. monthly_revenue uses latest_revenue_month() — published by the 10th of the following month, with a 5-day buffer (day<15 falls back two months) so e.g. on 2026-05-01 the year=115 month=3 (Mar 2026) data is requested.

_partial.description: True iff any Tier A leaf carries _error across yfinance/mops/twse/finmind. Re-walked after memo-fetch's extra Tier A fetches are added (see pack.py pack_memo_fetch tail loop).

history.description: Tier 2. Default period=2y for memo-fetch (vs 1y for snapshot).

monthly_revenue.description: _action='monthly-revenue'. Fetched with --year=<rev_year> --month=<rev_month> in ROC form (rev_year = today.year - 1911 with the 5-day buffer rule).

announcements.description: _action='realtime-announcements'. Market-wide latest 10 (per pack.py args), filtered by --market sii|otc per-_normalized.market. Per-ticker filter is best-effort upstream.

three_investor.description: TWSE three_investor SNAPSHOT (latest day). Distinct from FinMind three_investor_flow which is the daily TIME SERIES.

stock_day_history.description: Tier A. Present ONLY when _normalized.market=='sii'. Uses TWSE /rwd/ endpoint with --months derived from period (2y→24, 1y→12, else 6). For .TWO listings this key is absent and finmind.price_history is populated instead.

three_investor_flow.description: Tier 2-gap. T86 daily 三大法人 flow, 90-day window.

margin_history.description: Tier 2-gap. 融資融券 daily time series, 90-day window. _action='TaiwanStockMarginPurchaseShortSale'.

price_history.description: Tier 2 (NOT 2-gap). Present ONLY when _normalized.market=='otc'. .TWO has no TWSE /rwd/ equivalent so FinMind TaiwanStockPrice supplies the OHLCV history. date_start = today - period_days (730 for 2y, 365 for 1y).
